blurb: Apple Wallet consolidates payment cards, car keys, transit passes, access credentials, and government-issued IDs into a unified secure framework backed by the Secure Element and Secure Enclave. Car keys conform to the Car Connectivity Consortium standard using ECKA-DH key agreement and Ultra Wideband for passive entry ranging. Digital IDs implement ISO/IEC 18013-5 mobile driving license presentation, allowing selective disclosure of only requested attributes to verifying readers. Each credential type uses hardware-backed cryptographic operations and requires user authentication before presentation, preventing unauthorized use even if the device is compromised.
